violations.description: Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --In-use utensil * was not properly stored during pauses in food preparation or dispensing. - A plate, knife and spoon were left out on the counter. Items used for breakfast burritos.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)* were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. - Floors dirty and stickey - Walls dirty
